name: Maple Ridge — Aspen Vacation Property

provenance.source: Closing statement — First American Title, August 30 2021
provenance.author: grayson.culliford@hivefs.com

thesis_summary: A 4-bedroom vacation property in Aspen, CO held by the family trust. Generates rental income when not in family use (approximately 16 weeks/year at $4,500–$6,000/week). Aspen real estate has appreciated at ~6% annually over the past decade. This is a dual-purpose asset: a family retreat and a store of value that keeps pace with inflation. The mortgage at 6.25% fixed is serviced by rental income with a comfortable DSCR.
risk_factors: Illiquid — cannot be sold quickly in a downturn without significant discount
DSCR currently 1.07 — below our 1.25 comfort threshold; monitoring required
Wildfire risk in the region; insurance reviewed annually
Rental income seasonal and dependent on discretionary travel spending
